tasks.title: Add unit tests for filesystem helpers
tasks.tierRationale: This is a single-file, mechanical test addition with explicit exports, reference conventions, and a fast scoped verification command.

tasks.title: Define the provider-agnostic streaming contract
tasks.tierRationale: This is a cross-runtime architecture decision that defines semantics consumed by every provider and caller; an executive tier must settle compatibility and lifecycle behavior before implementation.

tasks.title: Refactor provider runtimes to the shared streaming contract
tasks.tierRationale: Although the files are localized, this slice requires coordinating two transport implementations, preserving divergent provider behavior, and updating behavioral tests against an architectural contract.

tasks.title: Migrate orchestration callers to the shared runtime interface
tasks.tierRationale: This is repo-wide coordination across routing, review, decomposition, escalation, and topology flows; correctness depends on preserving interactions among multiple callers and runtime providers.

tasks.title: Verify the complete runtime migration
tasks.tierRationale: Full-suite verification and regression resolution require repository-wide judgment and cannot be reduced to a cheap isolated worker check.
